title: Token Burn
description: Live subscription quota usage and forecast metrics emitted by token-burn.

panels.title: Scope
panels.markdownContent: Provider live quota signals from token-burn. Synthetic `otel-test` samples are excluded with `provider <> test`.

queries.query: SELECT u.provider || '/' || u.account_id || '/' || u.window AS "x_axis_1", u.value AS "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_usage_used_percent" u JOIN (SELECT provider, account_id, window, max(_timestamp) AS latest FROM "token_burn_usage_used_percent" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY provider, account_id, window) m ON u.provider = m.provider AND u.account_id = m.account_id AND u.window = m.window AND u._timestamp = m.latest ORDER BY y_axis_1 DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT u.provider || '/' || u.account_id || '/' || u.window AS "x_axis_1", u.value AS "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_forecast_projected_reset_percent" u JOIN (SELECT provider, account_id, window, max(_timestamp) AS latest FROM "token_burn_forecast_projected_reset_percent" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY provider, account_id, window) m ON u.provider = m.provider AND u.account_id = m.account_id AND u.window = m.window AND u._timestamp = m.latest ORDER BY y_axis_1 DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT u.provider || '/' || u.account_id || '/' || u.window AS "x_axis_1", u.value / 3600.0 AS "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_usage_seconds_to_reset" u JOIN (SELECT provider, account_id, window, max(_timestamp) AS latest FROM "token_burn_usage_seconds_to_reset" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY provider, account_id, window) m ON u.provider = m.provider AND u.account_id = m.account_id AND u.window = m.window AND u._timestamp = m.latest ORDER BY y_axis_1 ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) as "x_axis_1", provider || '/' || account_id || '/' || window as "breakdown_1", max(value) as "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_usage_used_percent" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1 ASC

panels.title: Projected Percent At Reset Over Time

queries.query: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) as "x_axis_1", provider || '/' || account_id || '/' || window as "breakdown_1", max(value) as "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_forecast_projected_reset_percent" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1 ASC

SELECT u.provider || '/' || u.account_id AS "x_axis_1", u.window AS "x_axis_2", u.value AS "x_axis_3", r.value / 3600.0 AS "x_axis_4" FROM "token_burn_usage_used_percent" u JOIN (SELECT provider, account_id, window, max(_timestamp) AS latest FROM "token_burn_usage_used_percent" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY provider, account_id, window) mu ON u.provider = mu.provider AND u.account_id = mu.account_id AND u.window = mu.window AND u._timestamp = mu.latest LEFT JOIN (SELECT r1.provider, r1.account_id, r1.window, r1.value FROM "token_burn_usage_seconds_to_reset" r1 JOIN (SELECT provider, account_id, window, max(_timestamp) AS latest FROM "token_burn_usage_seconds_to_reset" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY provider, account_id, window) mr ON r1.provider = mr.provider AND r1.account_id = mr.account_id AND r1.window = mr.window AND r1._timestamp = mr.latest) r ON u.provider = r.provider AND u.account_id = r.account_id AND u.window = r.window ORDER BY u.value DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) as "x_axis_1", provider || '/' || account_id || '/' || window as "breakdown_1", max(value) as "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_forecast_burn_rate_percent_per_hour" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1 ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) as "x_axis_1", provider || '/' || account_id || '/' || window as "breakdown_1", max(value / 3600.0) as "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_usage_seconds_to_reset" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1 ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) as "x_axis_1", provider || '/' || account_id as "breakdown_1", max(value) as "y_axis_1" FROM "token_burn_poll_runs_total" WHERE provider <> 'test' GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1 ASC
